mapper.select:
SELECT tab.id, tab.orderNo, tab.welfareCenterRewardType, tab.receiveStatus, tab.currencyCode, tab.amount, tab.detailType, tab.pfTime, tab.pfEndTime FROM (
SELECT id, order_no as orderNo FROM site_activity_order_record WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and receive_status = 0
UNION ALL SELECT id, order_id as orderNo FROM site_vip_award_record WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and receive_status = 0
UNION ALL SELECT id, order_no as orderNo FROM site_task_order_record WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and task_type = 'novice' and receive_status = 0
UNION ALL SELECT id, order_no as orderNo FROM site_task_order_record WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and task_type = 'daily' and receive_status = 0
UNION ALL SELECT id, order_no as orderNo FROM site_task_order_record WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and task_type = 'week' and receive_status = 0 ) tab
